description: ABFM In-Training Examination (ITE) question bank — 1,200 questions from 2020–2025, multi-dimensionally classified and enriched with clinical references and explanations.

column_schema.QuestionID: Unique key. Format Q[year]-[sequential]. Global sequential across all 1200 rows.
column_schema.QuestionStem: Full question text including vignette, lab tables, and answer choices A–E.
column_schema.BodySystem: 19-category organ system classification. Gold standard 2022–2024 (PDF extraction); ML-predicted 2020–2021 and 2025.
column_schema.BodySystem_Confidence: ML decision-function score (signed distance from boundary). Higher = more confident. Not a probability. Only meaningful for Predicted rows.
column_schema.ClinicalCategory: ABFM 9-bucket patient-population framework. Gold standard from PDFs. 2022–2023 ONLY (393 rows). Null for all other years. Discontinued by ABFM after 2023.
column_schema.BlueprintCategory: ABFM 5-category blueprint framework. Gold standard from PDFs. 2024–2025 ONLY (400 rows). Null for other years.
column_schema.BlueprintCategory_Predicted: Same 5-category blueprint applied to ALL 1200 rows via ML. Use for retrospective cross-year Blueprint analysis.
column_schema.Blueprint_Confidence: ML probability score (0–1) for BlueprintCategory_Predicted. Gold rows = 1.0 by definition.
column_schema.Subcategory: 11-category question-type taxonomy: Pharmacology, Management, Diagnosis, Treatment, Screening, Workup, Prevention, Prognosis/Risk, Counseling, Interpretation, Pathophysiology.
column_schema.Subcat_Source: Confidence tier: high (52%), medium (36%), low (4%), fallback (8%). Low/fallback = candidates for manual review.
column_schema.Reference: Source clinical literature citation. Coverage as of 2026-03-03: 200/200 for all years (2020–2025). 2025 refs backfilled from 2025_ITE_Critique.docx via extract_2025_refs.py.
column_schema.Explanation: ABFM-published rationale for the correct answer. Contains embedded reference in Ref:/Reference: format.
column_schema.ScoringStatus: ABFM scoring flag: Scored, Deleted-Content, Deleted-Psychometric. 2024–2025 only (400 rows). Null for 2020–2023.
column_schema.YearLastUsed: Null across all 1200 rows. Never populated in source data. Candidate for removal.

removed_columns_history.PrimaryCategory: Removed 2026-03-02. Was legacy Haiku API-predicted field. Only 60.5% agreement with gold-standard BodySystem.
removed_columns_history.Subcategory_Cluster: Removed 2026-03-02. Legacy K-means artifact. No clinical utility.

supporting_databases.03_database/body_system_full.csv: Full body system labels for all 1200 questions.
supporting_databases.03_database/subcategory_labels.csv: Full subcategory labels for all 1200 questions.
supporting_databases.03_database/raw_files/: CSV backups of ABFM_ITE_Master_v2 and per-year files.

year_files.note: Each contains 200 questions for that year. Rebuilt via merge_and_rebuild.py. Note: year files were last rebuilt 2026-03-02; Reference column improvements from 2026-03-03 are in the master only. Run merge_and_rebuild.py to propagate.

04_outputs/ITE_Analysis_2020_2025.xlsx.description: 8-tab analytical workbook: Overview, Body System, Subcategory, Blueprint, Clinical Category, High-Yield Combos, Year Trends, Data Quality. 97 live formulas, 0 errors.

analysis_outputs.04_outputs/ite_qbank_20-25.docx: Full question bank Word export (940 KB).
analysis_outputs.04_outputs/outline_yield_report.xlsx: Legacy AAFP session-mapping analysis. Superseded by ITE_Analysis workbook.
analysis_outputs.04_outputs/HighYield_Study_Guide.xlsx: Earlier high-yield topic ranking. Retained for reference.

active_scripts.05_scripts/classify_body_system.py: TF-IDF + LinearSVC body system classifier. Outputs body_system_full.csv.
active_scripts.05_scripts/merge_and_rebuild.py: CANONICAL REBUILD SCRIPT. Run after any label update to regenerate master + year files.
active_scripts.05_scripts/csv_to_docx.py: Converts question bank CSV to Word.
active_scripts.05_scripts/extract_2025_refs.py: NEW 2026-03-03. Parses 2025_ITE_Critique.docx to extract References blocks for Q2025-001 through Q2025-200. Uses 200 'References' markers as block boundaries. Year-pattern + prose-bleed filtering. Output: 02_working/refs_2025_extracted.csv (423 refs, 200/200 questions).
active_scripts.05_scripts/backfill_2025_refs.py: NEW 2026-03-03. Backfills Reference column in master for 2025 null rows using refs_2025_extracted.csv RefIndex=1. Filled 3 remaining nulls (197 were already populated). Also updates question_ref_pairs.csv.
active_scripts.05_scripts/update_qrp_2025.py: NEW 2026-03-03. Replaces partial 2025 rows in question_ref_pairs.csv with full 423-row extraction. QRP: 2025 → 2069 rows.

reference_coverage.notes: 6 remaining nulls are questions where ABFM did not provide a reference citation in source materials.

working_files_2025_refs.02_working/refs_2025_extracted.csv: 423 rows. Columns: QuestionID, RefIndex, RawRef. Primary ref for each question is RefIndex=1. Multi-ref questions have additional rows. Produced by extract_2025_refs.py v4.
working_files_2025_refs.02_working/refs_2025_summary.txt: Human-readable extraction log. Lists all refs per QID with first 120 chars. Zero zero-ref questions.

key_findings_summary.blueprint_distribution: 35% Acute Care | 25% Chronic Care | 20% Emergent | 15% Preventive | 5% Foundations

data_quality_flags.missing_references_2024: 4 questions (2%) have no reference — ABFM did not provide citations for these items
data_quality_flags.year_last_used: Null for all 1200 rows — never populated in source data. Candidate for removal.

contents: ABFM_ITE_AI_Tagged_excel.xlsx — Original Haiku API-tagged bank (still used by E_v4 for AI_ClinicalFocus column)

new_files_session_K.03_database/ite_questions_clean.json: INJECTION-READY question bank. 1,200 entries. Schema per question: question_id, exam_year, body_system, subcategory, blueprint, format (newline/inline/garbled), question_text (stem only, no blank answer block), choices [{letter, text}], correct_letter, correct_text, explanation (encoding-clean), reference, needs_review. 1,152 ready, 48 flagged. Key input to supplement doc pipeline.
new_files_session_K.03_database/build_clean_question_bank.py: Parses ABFM_ITE_Master_v2.xlsx into ite_questions_clean.json. Handles 3 stem formats: newline-separated (955), inline run-together (197), garbled (48). Fixes encoding artifacts.
new_files_session_K.03_database/patch_problem_questions_v2.p: Manual patches for 7 edge-case questions that failed initial parse. Re-parses directly from master. Q2020-036 assigned substitute_qid=Q2025-033.
new_files_session_K.03_database/patch_problem_questions.py: SUPERSEDED by v2 — retained for reference only.

2026-03-06_session_K: Built ite_questions_clean.json — 1,200 questions fully parsed: encoding artifacts fixed, choices separated into structured array, correct answer text matched. 1,152 questions injection-ready, 48 flagged needs_review. 7 edge-case questions manually patched via patch_problem_questions_v2.py (inline format, stray markers, encoding artifacts). 1 genuinely garbled question (Q2020-036, Respiratory) assigned substitute Q2025-033. New files: 03_database/ite_questions_clean.json, 03_database/build_clean_question_bank.py, 03_database/patch_problem_questions_v2.py.
